headline: The operating system for adult life.
subheadline: Automate obligations, organize money, navigate health, and keep family life moving with a persistent concierge.

features.title: Admin Autopilot
features.description: Turn obligations, documents, and deadlines into clear missions with guided execution.

features.title: Money Mission Control
features.description: Track bills, renewals, subscriptions, and decisions with calm, precise reminders.

features.title: Persistent Concierge
features.description: Get context-aware help across onboarding, billing, workflows, and support.
